---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Scientific use case

What are you trying to compute or analyse? The package is small enough
that scope decisions are driven by what real workflows need, so concrete
use cases carry a lot of weight.

## Proposed feature

Describe the capability you'd like. If you have a sketch of the API or
the inputs/outputs you'd expect, include it here.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried working around this with the existing API? What didn't
work, or what was awkward?

## References

Papers, preprints, or other implementations that motivate or describe
the feature.

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'd be willing to open a PR for this myself (with guidance if needed)
- [ ] I can help test or review
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea
